common.supportMessage: If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team.

legal.restrictMessage: Your account has been restricted. Please review the details above and contact support if you have questions.
legal.actionTakenMessage: An action has been taken on your account. Please review the details above and contact support if you have questions.
legal.actionFooter: If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.
legal.actionNotificationBody: Your account has been subject to a legal action: {{actionType}}. Reason: {{reason}}
legal.warningText:
Dear {{firstName}} {{lastName}},

You have received a {{warningType}} warning on your account.

{{warningSeverity}}

Warning Message:
{{message}}

Please review our platform rules and ensure compliance. Continued violations may result in account suspension or termination.

If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.

Best regards,
Cumprido Support Team
legal.warningReceived: You have received a {{warningType}} warning on your account.
legal.warningComplianceMessage: Please review our platform rules and ensure compliance. Continued violations may result in account suspension or termination.
legal.warningContactMessage: If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.
legal.finalWarningSeverity: FINAL WARNING - This is your last warning before account suspension
legal.majorWarningSeverity: MAJOR VIOLATION - Serious action may be taken if behavior continues
legal.minorWarningSeverity: Minor Violation - Please review and correct your behavior
legal.actionRevokedText:
Dear {{firstName}},

The following action has been revoked:

{{subject}}

If you have any questions, please contact our support team.
legal.actionRevokedMessage: The following action has been revoked:

actionForm.subject: 📋 Action Form: {{actionType}} - {{firstName}} {{lastName}}
actionForm.text:
Dear {{firstName}} {{lastName}},

An action form has been submitted regarding your account.

Action Type: {{actionType}}

Details:
{{details}}

Please review the information above and take any necessary action. If you have any questions or need clarification, please contact our support team.

Best regards,
Cumprido Support Team
actionForm.title: 📋 Action Form Notice
actionForm.submittedMessage: An action form has been submitted regarding your account.
actionForm.reviewMessage: Please review the information above and take any necessary action. If you have any questions or need clarification, please contact our support team.
actionForm.notificationBody: An action form has been submitted regarding your account. Action Type: {{actionType}}

kyc.documentApprovedMessage: Great news! Your {{documentName}} has been approved by our verification team.
kyc.verificationProgressing: Your KYC verification is progressing. We'll notify you once all documents are reviewed.
kyc.documentRejectedMessage: We've reviewed your {{documentName}}, but unfortunately it has been rejected.
kyc.uploadNewDocument: Please log in to your account and upload a new document. If you have questions, contact our support team.
kyc.documentApprovedText: {{documentName}} has been approved. Your verification is progressing.
kyc.documentRejectedText: {{documentName}} has been rejected. Please upload a new document.
kyc.documentRequiredText: {{documentName}} Required. Reason: {{reason}}. Please log in to upload.

payments.jobCompletedSuccessfullyMessage: The job "{{jobTitle}}" has been completed successfully.
payments.rateYourExperienceMessage: Help us improve by rating your experience with this job.

receipts.payoutMessage: Your payment of {{amount}} has been transferred to your account. Transfer ID: {{transferId}}
receipts.payoutTimeline: Funds typically arrive in your bank account within 2-5 business days.
receipts.footerNote: This receipt serves as your official record of payment. Please keep it for your records.

jobs.jobReferralSubject: {{employerName}} referred you to a job opportunity on Cumprido
jobs.jobReferralMessage: {{employerName}} ({{employerEmail}}) has referred you to a job opportunity on Cumprido that might be a great fit for your skills!
jobs.jobReferralFooter: This referral was sent by {{employerName}}. If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
jobs.applicationSubmittedMessage: Great news! Your application has been submitted successfully.
jobs.applicationSubmittedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been submitted successfully.

Location: {{jobLocation}}

We'll notify you once the employer reviews your application.

Best regards,
Cumprido Team
jobs.applicationStatusMessage: The employer will review your application and get back to you soon. We'll notify you when there's an update.
jobs.nextStep1: Wait for the employer to review your application
jobs.nextStep4: Keep your profile updated to increase your chances
jobs.applicationAcceptedMessage: We're thrilled to inform you that your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been accepted!
jobs.applicationAcceptedEmailSubject: Congratulations! Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been accepted
jobs.acceptedNextStep1: The employer will contact you shortly with next steps
jobs.acceptedNextStep2: Check your notifications for any updates
jobs.acceptedNextStep3: You can also chat with the employer directly through Cumprido
jobs.applicationRejectedMessage: Thank you for your interest in the position "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}}. After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates at this time.
jobs.keepGoingMessage: Don't be discouraged. This is just one opportunity, and there are many more waiting for you on Cumprido.
jobs.rejectedNextStep2: Keep your profile updated and complete
jobs.rejectedNextStep3: Apply to positions that match your skills
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneMessage: The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneText:
Hello {{employerName}},

The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.

Please review and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneReviewMessage: The service provider has completed their work and is ready for your review. Please verify the completion and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneNextSteps: Review the completed work and mark the job as complete in your dashboard to proceed with payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneFooter: Once you mark the job as complete, the payment process will be finalized according to your payment terms.
jobs.newJobMatchText:
A new job "{{jobTitle}}" matches your skills and is near you in {{city}}.
Address: {{location}}
jobs.newJobMatchNotificationBody: A new job "{{jobTitle}}" matches your skills and is near you in {{city}}. Address: {{location}}
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableMessage: We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableText:
Hello {{applicantName}},

We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.

Best regards,
Cumprido Team
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableBrowse: You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableAppreciate: We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.
jobs.applicationWithdrawnMessage: {{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".
jobs.applicationWithdrawnText:
Hello {{employerName}},

{{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.

Best regards,
Cumprido Team
jobs.applicationWithdrawnBrowse: You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.
